game_info.title: ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)
game_info.concept: **ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story):** Players manage and expand a grid-based amusement park by tapping on a menu to select and place attractions like "Coffee Cups" or "Trampolines" onto available land. Guests visit the park, generating income and satisfaction points, which are then spent in a research tree to unlock new attractions, facilities, and upgrades, enhancing park appeal and efficiency. The core loop involves building, observing guest feedback via SNS posts, researching improvements, and expanding the park's land area through construction projects to accommodate larger rides like "Ferris Wheels" and "Roller Coasters." Annually, players can scout and recruit mascots, which not only boost park popularity but also unlock unique themed zones like "Snow Country" or "Space Zones." The primary objective is to climb national park rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity, with difficulty scaling as guest expectations and competition increase.
game_info.description: Welcome to ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)! Build and manage your dream amusement park by placing attractions on a grid to attract guests. Guests generate income and satisfaction points that unlock new attractions and upgrades through research. Expand your park's land area, recruit mascots to unlock themed zones, and climb the national park rankings. Balance guest satisfaction, income generation, and strategic expansion to become the top-ranked amusement park in the nation!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selection and park camera
Space: Confirm selection / Place attraction / Toggle menu
Z: Cancel / Remove attraction (when hovering over placed attraction)
Shift: Fast-forward time (hold to speed up guest movement and income generation)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates core game mechanics: menu navigation, attraction placement, guest spawning, and income generation. Tests that the game loop runs correctly and all basic interactions work as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the menu, place a few basic attractions on the grid, wait for guests to arrive and generate income, then attempt to unlock one research upgrade. Verify that all state changes occur correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully place multiple attractions, observe guests visiting them, accumulate income over time, and unlock at least one research item. The test is successful if all these actions complete without errors and state updates are reflected correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that implements an optimal strategy to achieve the highest park ranking. Tests progression through research tree, land expansion, mascot recruitment, and themed zone unlocking to maximize guest satisfaction and popularity.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically place high-value attractions, prioritize research that unlocks better attractions and efficiency upgrades, expand land strategically, recruit mascots to unlock themed zones, and optimize attraction placement for maximum guest satisfaction and income generation.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve the top national park ranking (Rank 1) by maximizing guest satisfaction above 90% and park popularity above a threshold. The test succeeds when GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached with optimal park configuration.

TEST_3.test_description: Test rapid expansion and resource management by placing many attractions quickly and managing the balance between spending on attractions versus research. Validates that the economy system works correctly under stress.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Place attractions as quickly as possible across available land, alternate between building and researching, and test that income generation scales appropriately with the number of attractions and guests.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully place numerous attractions, maintain positive cash flow, unlock multiple research tiers, and verify that guest satisfaction remains manageable. Test succeeds if the park reaches medium ranking without running out of resources.
TEST_3.description: Test rapid expansion and resource management by placing many attractions quickly and managing the balance between spending on attractions versus research. Validates that the economy system works correctly under stress.

TEST_3.expected: Successfully place numerous attractions, maintain positive cash flow, unlock multiple research tiers, and verify that guest satisfaction remains manageable. Test succeeds if the park reaches medium ranking without running out of resources.
